title: Whispering Sage
writer: Harry Sinclair Drago, Joseph Noël, Harold Shumate
actors: Buck Jones, Natalie Joyce, Emile Chautard
plot: Buck Kildare, searching for a killer, encounters a colony of Basques in the desert and saves them from the henchmen of Hugh Acklin, owner of an adjoining ranch, who wants to take over the immigrants' land. Discovering Acklin's dup...
